scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing, premium corporate feel, bento grids for frameworks.

animations.page_transitions: Smooth fade and slight Y-translate using framer-motion
animations.scroll_reveals: Staggered fade-up for grid items and text blocks
animations.hover_states: Cards lift -translate-y-1 with expanded soft shadow
animations.chatbot: Spring animation on open, staggered message bubbles

components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header, z-50, solid layout
components.hero: 80vh min-height, dynamic image background with bg-black/40 overlay, bold typography, staggered entrance
components.four_pillars: Bento grid layout with subtle hover effects and abstract icons
components.chatbot_widget: Floating bottom-right widget, distinct brand primary color (#1C3F3A), sleek corporate chat interface
components.buttons: Rounded-lg, px-6 py-3, bg-[#1C3F3A] text-white, hover:bg-[#15302C] hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D smooth organic shapes in bone white and deep forest green for home page hero

framework_background.description: Minimalist abstract architectural background for Four Pillars / Approach section

impact_abstract.description: Abstract 3D glass spheres on sand surface for Impact / Capability Statement

team_meeting_1.description: Diverse corporate team meeting for About Us / Team

team_meeting_2.description: Diverse business team collaborating for Organisational Development Service

counselling_1.description: Professional counselling room for EAP & Counselling Service

counselling_2.description: Therapy session for Psychosocial Risk Management

office_architecture.description: Clean modern corporate office architecture for Corporate Training

pages_and_routing.Home: Overview of services, hero, pillars, impact counters, testimonials
pages_and_routing.About Us: Mission, Pameltex Group connection, team profiles
pages_and_routing.Services: Multi-page structure (EAP & Counselling, Corporate Training, Psychosocial Risk, Org Development)
pages_and_routing.Our Approach: Deep dive into Assessment, Intervention, Reinforcement, Reporting
pages_and_routing.Industries: Financial Services, Healthcare, Education, Government, Manufacturing

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text on all backgrounds. Use text-shadow over images if needed.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g. data-testid='contact-submit-btn')

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use framer-motion for scroll-reveals and page transitions.
Implement the UI using React (.js files, no .tsx as requested) + Tailwind.
Use standard Shadcn components (Cards, Forms, Inputs, Buttons) but heavily customize padding and border-radii as per design guidelines.
Ensure the floating chatbot is accessible globally across all routes. Make sure it has open-state animation and message microinteractions.
For the hero section, use 'hero_background' image with a bg-black/40 overlay. Do NOT make the overlay too dark.
Implement the 'Four Pillars Framework' using a bento grid with abstract icons and hover motion.
Ensure generous spacing (p-8 to p-24) to maintain the premium corporate feel.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as per the critical rules.
